## Summary
- [ ] What changed
- [ ] Why it changed

## Verification
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run deploy:dryrun:entitlement`
- [ ] `npm run deploy:dryrun:bookings`

## Deployment Notes
- [ ] Cloudflare bindings changed
- [ ] Azure secrets changed
- [ ] Stripe or Discord credentials changed
- [ ] Follow-up manual steps required

## Risk Review
- [ ] Webhook auth considered
- [ ] Idempotency considered
- [ ] Retry or queue behavior considered
- [ ] Metrics or archive side effects considered
